reviews.review_description: Wow, for peoples who loves bow shooting games (like me) this is great game, it has potential to be huge in the future (fingers crossed). Brilliant idea of switching bows and shooting moving targets. It could be as big as Beat Saber or similar games. I would like to see in the future some challenges, maps, maybe some rhythm styled target shooting. Main menu could be more clearly for choosing game modes. Anyway, For the first contact with this game I am surprised. Don’t give up on this project and please don’t even think about Bowmaster V2 or whatever, try to make this game big!

developer_response.body: Hey thanks for taking the time to leave this review, it means a lot. I'll do everything I can to turn Bowmaster into a banger!
